calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an Adult and of a Minor(s).
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioners Hsiu Hwa Chung and Jia Long Teng were present in pro per as guardian ad litem for and with the minors Shao Hsuan Teng and Shao Wei Teng, both were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name(s) the parent(mother) or of the minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name for the minors to Sherry Shao Hsuan Teng and Judy Shao Wei Teng, and the parent(mother) to Hanna Hsui Hwa Chung.
Decree Changing Name of the minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
